details.test: Task 1 - Two limited edition vinyl under 60 with cheapest shipping
Task 2 - Pre-order highest-rated vinyl (adapted) with Pay on Release
Task 3 - Buy black T-shirt M and second black merch item same artist within 80 (adapted)
Task 4 - Create account and wishlist three highly rated albums (adapted)
Task 5 - Add cheapest ambient limited-edition vinyl (adapted) to cart via search
Task 6 - Purchase three electronic tracks under 2 each (adapted BPM and artists)
Task 7 - Follow artist, wishlist latest album, preview track, add merch (adapted)
Task 8 - Build 50-70 album order and apply INDIE10 with card payment
Task 9 - Submit demo via contact form
